title: The Warlock's Cave
author: Andrew Hilton
introduction:
You are an adventurer seeking fame and fortune in the wilds beyond Silverton. Word has reached the town of a warlock who has taken up residence in the cave network beneath Dogtooth Mountain, terrorising the local villages.

Armed with little more than your sword and your wits, you have volunteered to deal with this menace. The cave entrance yawns before you like an open wound in the hillside. Cold air breathes outward, carrying the faint smell of sulphur.

Your adventure begins here.

magic_sword.name: Enchanted Sword
magic_sword.description: A blade that glows faintly with magic. +2 SKILL in combat.

lantern.name: Lantern
lantern.description: An oil lantern that lights dark places.

silver_key.name: Silver Key
silver_key.description: A small ornate silver key. It must open something...

provisions.name: Provisions
provisions.description: A pack of food and water. Restores 4 STAMINA.

1.text:
You step inside the cave. The lantern throws dancing shadows across the damp walls. Two tunnels branch ahead of you — one curving left into darkness, one sloping right towards a distant orange glow.

As your eyes adjust, you notice a section of the wall to your left looks oddly different to the rest — the stone is smoother, almost deliberate.

choices.text: Examine the smooth section of wall (Lantern)

2.text: The left tunnel narrows and twists before opening into a low chamber. A GOBLIN SCOUT crouches over a small fire, gnawing on something you'd rather not identify. It spins around with a screech and draws a rusty blade.

3.text:
The right tunnel slopes downward and you emerge onto a narrow stone bridge spanning a deep pit. Halfway across, a loose flagstone shifts under your foot.

You throw out your arms for balance — will luck be with you?

test_luck.lucky_text: By sheer reflex you catch yourself against the wall. Heart hammering, you inch across the rest of the bridge safely.
test_luck.unlucky_text: You lurch sideways and slam into the pit wall, scrabbling for a handhold before hauling yourself back up. That's going to hurt in the morning.

4.text:
You hold the lantern close to the smooth stone and notice a faint seam — a hidden door! You work your fingers into the crack and push. The door grinds open, revealing a small alcove.

Inside, resting on a stone shelf wrapped in oilcloth, is a beautifully crafted sword. The blade has runes etched along its length and hums faintly when you pick it up. This is no ordinary weapon.

5.text:
Both tunnels converge at a heavy iron door set into the cave wall. The door has no handle — only a small silver keyhole.

This must be the entrance to the warlock's inner sanctum.

choices.text: Head back to find another way

6.text:
The silver key turns smoothly in the lock. The iron door swings open.

Beyond lies a circular chamber lit by green witch-fire. The warlock stands at the far end, but before he can react you are upon him. Caught off guard and without his defences, the warlock surrenders.

The villages of the valley are safe. Your name will be sung in the taverns of Silverton for years to come.

Your adventure ends in glory!
